column1: # Tab-separated. IGNORE suppresses the alert entirely.

column3: Cookie without SameSite Attribute (fixed — SameSite=Lax set in session config)
Big Redirect Detected (fixed — Redirect::to() calls exit consistently)
Private IP Disclosure (Docker internal IPs in response, not real leak)
In Page Banner Information Leak (Apache default page version strings from Docker)
Server Leaks Version Information (local Apache config, not project code)
Content Security Policy Header Not Set (UserSpice has user-configurable CSP)
Permissions Policy Header Not Set (local Apache config, not project code)
Information Disclosure - Suspicious Comments (HTML/JS comments, not secrets)
Modern Web Application (ZAP detected JS frameworks — purely informational)
Authentication Request Identified (ZAP found login forms — expected)
Session Management Response Identified (ZAP detected session cookies — expected)
Storable and Cacheable Content (static assets are cacheable — correct behavior)
